message:
feat(pager): Nemhauser submodular greedy prefetch selector (IMPL-8)

Add `submodular_prefetch` module with a Nemhauser-Wolsey-Fisher (1978)
greedy selector for prefetch candidate subsets. Given a bandwidth
budget B and a candidate set C with per-page hit-probability
estimates, greedy_select picks S ⊆ C with |S| ≤ B maximizing the
monotone submodular objective

    f(S) = Σ hit_prob(p) - λ · Σ_{p<q, same group} hit_prob(p)·hit_prob(q)

Under submodularity+monotonicity, greedy achieves

    f(S_greedy) ≥ (1 - 1/e) · f(S_opt) ≈ 0.6321 · f(S_opt)

(Nemhauser-Wolsey-Fisher 1978, tight for general cardinality-
constrained monotone submodular maximization). The linear benefit
term is trivially submodular; the negative pairwise coverage penalty
on same-cacheline groups makes f strictly submodular so greedy avoids
piling selections onto one bandwidth slot.

Module surface:
- struct Candidate { page, hit_prob: [0,1], cacheline_group: u16 }
- fn greedy_select(&[Candidate], budget, penalty) -> Vec<PageNumber>
- fn expected_gain(&[Candidate], &Candidate, penalty) -> f64
- fn objective(&[Candidate], penalty) -> f64

Tests (10, all passing):
1.  budget = 0 returns empty
2.  empty candidate set returns empty
3.  budget ≥ |C| returns all candidates (sorted by gain)
4.  penalty = 0, distinct groups → greedy ≡ top-k by hit_prob
5.  Heavy penalty on shared group forces greedy to spread across groups
6.  expected_gain exactly matches Δobjective at every step
7.  Strict positive-gain rule → greedy refuses non-helpful picks
8.  Brute-force opt sweep on 3 synthetic traces: ratio ≥ 1 - 1/e
9.  hit_prob clamped to [0,1] (incl. NaN → 0)
10. Negative penalty treated as zero

Observed on the 3 bound-test traces: greedy = optimum (ratio = 1.0),
comfortably above the 0.6321 worst-case bound.

Integration: adds SimpleTransaction::prefetch_page_hints_greedy which
runs greedy_select then issues a hint for each selected page through
the same write_set → txn_read_cache → published → shared cache
ladder as prefetch_page_hint. Existing callers are unchanged; the
submodular path is AVAILABLE, not mandatory.

Module: crates/fsqlite-pager/src/submodular_prefetch.rs (400 lines,
no unsafe). Clippy + fmt clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
